summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of FORGE v9 P1/P2 features: ① File history/versioning/diff/rollback, ② In-app notifications, ③ Multi-agent orchestration (planner→coder→reviewer), ④ Agent write_file creates version with source='agent'. All 32 v9 tests passed + 27 v8 regression tests + 29 v7 regression tests = 88 total tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: File versioning: PUT /files creates version in project_file_versions collection with source='user'
Idempotent by content: Identical content back-to-back does NOT create duplicate version
History endpoint: GET /files/history returns versions newest first, filters by path correctly
Version detail: GET /files/version/{id} returns full doc including content
Diff endpoint: GET /files/diff returns unified diff between versions (default: previous vs current)
Specific version diff: GET /files/diff?a=v1&b=v2 returns diff between specific versions
Restore: POST /files/restore copies version content back and creates new version with source='restore'
Restore permissions: Viewer role correctly blocked with 403, unknown version returns 404
Notifications: GET /notifications returns {notifications: [], unread: 0} for fresh user
Invite notification: POST /invite creates notification for invitee (if user exists)
Review notification: POST /review creates notification with kind='review'
Mark read: POST /notifications/read with {ids: []} marks specific, {ids: null} marks all
Auth required: Notification endpoints return 401 without session
Multi-agent: POST /multi-agent/stream streams phase_start/phase_end for planner, coder, reviewer
Multi-agent credits: Debits 3 credits, returns 402 when < 3 credits
Multi-agent message: Persists ONE assistant message with mode='multi' containing Plan/Build/Review sections
Multi-agent permissions: Viewer role blocked with 403
Agent versioning: Agent write_file tool creates version with source='agent'

success_rate.backend: 100% (32/32 v9 tests + 27/27 v8 regression + 29/29 v7 regression = 88/88 total)

test_credentials.note: Test data seeded via mongosh fixture in test file

seed_data_creation: Created test users (owner, viewer, invitee, low-credits) + sessions + project + project_members via mongosh for authenticated endpoint testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: v9 P1/P2 features fully tested: (1) File history - PUT /files creates versions, idempotent by content, GET /files/history returns newest first with path filter, GET /files/version/{id} returns full content, GET /files/diff returns unified diff, POST /files/restore copies content back and creates source='restore' version. (2) Notifications - GET /notifications returns list+unread count, POST /invite creates invite notification for invitee, POST /review creates review notification, POST /notifications/read marks specific or all read, 401 without auth. (3) Multi-agent - POST /multi-agent/stream streams 3 phases (planner/coder/reviewer), debits 3 credits, returns 402 if <3 credits, persists ONE message with mode='multi' containing Plan/Build/Review sections, viewer blocked with 403. (4) Agent write_file creates version with source='agent'. All v7/v8 regression tests still pass.

backend: PUT /api/projects/{id}/files creates version in project_file_versions
PUT /api/projects/{id}/files twice with DIFFERENT content creates 2 versions
PUT /api/projects/{id}/files with IDENTICAL content does NOT create duplicate (idempotent)
GET /api/projects/{id}/files/history returns all versions newest first
GET /api/projects/{id}/files/history?path=X filters to that path only
GET /api/projects/{id}/files/version/{version_id} returns full doc with content
GET /api/projects/{id}/files/diff?path=X returns unified diff (default: previous vs current)
GET /api/projects/{id}/files/diff?path=X&a=v1&b=v2 returns diff between specific versions
POST /api/projects/{id}/files/restore copies version content back, creates source='restore' version
POST /api/projects/{id}/files/restore as viewer → 403
POST /api/projects/{id}/files/restore with unknown version_id → 404
GET /api/notifications returns {notifications: [], unread: 0} for fresh user
POST /api/projects/{id}/invite creates notification for invitee (if user exists)
POST /api/projects/{id}/review creates notification with kind='review'
POST /api/notifications/read with {ids: [id1, id2]} marks those read
POST /api/notifications/read with {ids: null} marks all read
Notification endpoints require auth — 401 without session
POST /api/projects/{id}/multi-agent/stream streams phase_start/phase_end for 3 phases
Multi-agent debits 3 credits from user
Multi-agent returns 402 when user has < 3 credits
Multi-agent persists ONE assistant message with mode='multi'
Multi-agent message contains Plan, Build, Review sections
Multi-agent as viewer → 403
Agent write_file tool creates version with source='agent'
REGRESSION: Chat stream still works
REGRESSION: GET /api/models returns 7 models
REGRESSION: GET /api/settings works
REGRESSION: GET /api/payments/packages works
REGRESSION: Project CRUD works
REGRESSION: Memory GET/PUT works
REGRESSION: Export endpoint works
REGRESSION: Activity endpoint works

mocked_apis.none: No mocking - all LLM calls are real via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY through emergentintegrations

from_previous_iterations.emergentintegrations_library_bug: get_checkout_status() fails with Pydantic validation error - checkout creation works, status polling returns 502
